title: Asking Questions & Short Reading
description: Ask questions with the right question word and correct word order — using both the verb to be and do/does — match questions to their answers, and read short A1 texts to find details and make simple inferences.
sources: CEFR A1 descriptors (Council of Europe, Common European Framework of Reference)
Raymond Murphy, Essential Grammar in Use (questions, units 23-25 and 49-51)
